email.description: Business email address used for follow-up

phone.description: Phone or WhatsApp number, including country code

product_category.description: Product category, e.g. Consumer Electronics, Apparel, Home Goods

product_description.description: Description of the product to source, including key specifications, materials, target price, and quantity

target_quantity.description: Target order quantity, e.g. 1000 units, 5,000 units, a 20-foot container

target_unit_price.description: Target unit price or budget range, e.g. USD 3.50 - 4.00 per unit FOB Shanghai

target_port.description: Destination port or city, e.g. Los Angeles, Rotterdam, Hamburg, Sydney

additional_notes.description: Additional context: certifications needed, packaging, OEM/ODM, deadlines

source_page.description: Page on the website where the inquiry was submitted from, for internal analytics
